description_long: This object consists of two stacked hardcover books, one with a dark blue cover on top and the other with a brown cover beneath. Both books are bound together by a wide, matte black strap that runs vertically across their center. The covers are smooth and unadorned, with no visible illustrations, text, or decorative elements. The edges of the pages are slightly visible, showing a subtle contrast between the covers and the paper. The books have a solid, rectangular form and appear to be of standard textbook or novel size. The overall appearance is utilitarian and minimalistic, with a focus on function rather than ornamentation.
description: Two stacked hardcover books, one dark blue and one brown, bound together by a wide black strap. The covers are plain and smooth, with no visible illustrations or text.
description_view_0: Front view showing the dark blue book on top and the brown book beneath, with the black strap running horizontally across the center.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of both books and the vertical orientation of the black strap across the covers.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the plain covers and the strap, with the page edges slightly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, emphasizing the layered structure of the books and the strap's placement.
attribute_spine_design: The spines are plain, matching the cover colors (dark blue and brown), with no visible text or decorative elements.
